VAL-TUNE-004.evidence: Final comprehensive TP=4 benchmark run on 2026-03-15 07:45:36 UTC. C dispatch=37.0 tok/s (27.01 ms/tok). Cached+stream baseline=34.0 tok/s. Speedup vs cached+stream=1.09x. Speedup vs 25.5 combined baseline=1.45x. Full comparison table: serial=12.4, cached=23.7, combined=25.5, C dispatch+tuned=37.0 tok/s. Report generated at bench/tp4_optimization_report_v2.md.

VAL-RING-006.evidence: INT8 partial quantization documented as not beneficial: bench_tp4_sprint2.py report documents assessment. Star topology handles 10KB efficiently at ~119us/call (vs ring 1015us/call). Star is 8.5x faster than ring for 10KB payloads. INT8 would halve payload (10KB->5KB) but star is PCIe-latency-bound not bandwidth-bound; adding quantize/dequantize kernels exceeds any bandwidth savings. Documented in bench/tp4_optimization_report_v2.md.
